description: Have fun choosing from a collection of shoes from gas. Comfy and stylish, this pair is worth adding in your wardrobe as it is a perfect lifestyle footwear when teamed with jeans and tees. Upper Suede for structural comfort Central lace-up system for a snug and customised Fit Midsole Eva midsole for responsive cushioning and shock absorption Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Brand badge on the side for style Outsole Textured outsole for maximum durability, grip and traction shoe care Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
